name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability — tool, role, provider, MCP integration
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What problem does this solve?
<!-- Don't describe the solution yet. Describe the user pain. -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- Your idea. Be concrete. -->

## Category
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] New **tool** (new verb a drone can execute — `fetch`, `screenshot`, `sql_query`, …)
- [ ] New **role** (new prompt + tool bundle — `frontend`, `security-auditor`, …)
- [ ] New **provider** (new LLM backend — Anthropic native, Gemini, llama.cpp)
- [ ] New **MCP integration**
- [ ] CLI ergonomics / UX
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Other

<!-- What other approaches did you weigh? Why is this better? -->

## Would you be willing to implement this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR
- [ ] I could help with design but not code
- [ ] I'm just filing the request; happy for someone else to build it
